title: Leadership & Management - 50 Phrases
definition: 50 phrases for managers and leaders - delegating, motivating, setting direction, and supporting a team.

phrases.phrase: Here's the vision for this quarter
phrases.meaning: States a clear goal or direction.
phrases.example: Here's the vision for this quarter - focus on retention.

phrases.phrase: I'd like you to take ownership of this
phrases.example: I'd like you to take ownership of this project.

phrases.phrase: Let's align on priorities
phrases.meaning: Suggests agreeing on what matters most.
phrases.example: Let's align on priorities before the sprint starts.

phrases.phrase: I trust your judgment on this
phrases.example: I trust your judgment on this - go ahead and decide.

phrases.phrase: Here's what success looks like
phrases.meaning: Defines clear expectations for an outcome.
phrases.example: Here's what success looks like for this initiative.

phrases.phrase: I'll give you full autonomy on this
phrases.example: I'll give you full autonomy on this - just keep me posted.

phrases.phrase: Let's break this down into smaller milestones
phrases.meaning: Suggests dividing a big goal into steps.
phrases.example: Let's break this down into smaller milestones for clarity.

phrases.phrase: I want you to lead this initiative
phrases.example: I want you to lead this initiative going forward.

phrases.phrase: Let's set clear expectations upfront
phrases.meaning: Suggests defining goals before starting work.
phrases.example: Let's set clear expectations upfront to avoid confusion.

phrases.phrase: I'll support you however you need
phrases.meaning: Offers help without dictating the approach.
phrases.example: I'll support you however you need on this.

phrases.phrase: Feel empowered to make this decision
phrases.example: Feel empowered to make this decision without checking with me.

phrases.phrase: Let's map out a plan together
phrases.example: Let's map out a plan together before we start.

phrases.phrase: This is your call to make
phrases.meaning: Places decision-making authority with someone else.
phrases.example: This is your call to make - I trust you.

phrases.phrase: I really appreciate the effort you've put in
phrases.example: I really appreciate the effort you've put in this month.

phrases.phrase: You've made great progress
phrases.example: You've made great progress since last quarter.

phrases.phrase: I believe in your ability to pull this off
phrases.example: I believe in your ability to pull this off.

phrases.phrase: Let me know if you're feeling overwhelmed
phrases.example: Let me know if you're feeling overwhelmed with the deadlines.

phrases.phrase: Your work hasn't gone unnoticed
phrases.meaning: Acknowledges effort that might feel invisible.
phrases.example: Your work hasn't gone unnoticed - great job.

phrases.phrase: I want to invest in your growth
phrases.example: I want to invest in your growth this year.

phrases.phrase: What support do you need from me?
phrases.meaning: Asks how to help a team member.
phrases.example: What support do you need from me to hit this deadline?

phrases.phrase: Let's celebrate this win as a team
phrases.example: Let's celebrate this win as a team on Friday.

phrases.phrase: I'm proud of how far this team has come
phrases.example: I'm proud of how far this team has come this year.

phrases.phrase: Take the time you need to recharge
phrases.example: Take the time you need to recharge after this launch.

phrases.phrase: I've got your back on this
phrases.example: I've got your back on this if things get tough.

phrases.phrase: Let's turn this challenge into an opportunity
phrases.example: Let's turn this challenge into an opportunity to improve.

phrases.phrase: I want to hear your honest thoughts
phrases.example: I want to hear your honest thoughts on this plan.

phrases.phrase: You handled that really well
phrases.meaning: Compliments someone's handling of a situation.
phrases.example: You handled that really well under pressure.

phrases.phrase: Don't hesitate to come to me with concerns
phrases.example: Don't hesitate to come to me with concerns, anytime.

phrases.phrase: Let's find ways to make your job easier
phrases.meaning: Offers to remove obstacles for the team.
phrases.example: Let's find ways to make your job easier going forward.

phrases.phrase: This team's success is because of your work
phrases.meaning: Attributes team success to an individual's contribution.
phrases.example: This team's success is because of your work behind the scenes.

phrases.phrase: Let's discuss where things stand
phrases.meaning: Opens a performance or status conversation.
phrases.example: Let's discuss where things stand with your goals.

phrases.phrase: I want to give you some constructive feedback
phrases.meaning: Introduces feedback meant to help improve.
phrases.example: I want to give you some constructive feedback on the report.

phrases.phrase: Let's set some clear goals for next quarter
phrases.example: Let's set some clear goals for next quarter together.

phrases.phrase: I'd like to understand what's blocking you
phrases.example: I'd like to understand what's blocking you from hitting targets.

phrases.phrase: Let's create an improvement plan together
phrases.example: Let's create an improvement plan together over the next month.

phrases.phrase: I need to hold you accountable for this
phrases.example: I need to hold you accountable for this deadline.

phrases.phrase: This isn't meeting the bar we've set
phrases.meaning: Notes work falls short of expectations.
phrases.example: This isn't meeting the bar we've set for quality.

phrases.phrase: Let's course-correct before this becomes a bigger issue
phrases.example: Let's course-correct before this becomes a bigger issue.

phrases.phrase: I want to be transparent with you about this
phrases.meaning: Signals honesty about a difficult topic.
phrases.example: I want to be transparent with you about the reorg.

phrases.phrase: Change is coming, and here's how we'll manage it
phrases.example: Change is coming, and here's how we'll manage it together.

phrases.phrase: Let's keep communication open during this transition
phrases.example: Let's keep communication open during this transition.

phrases.phrase: I know this is a big adjustment
phrases.example: I know this is a big adjustment for the whole team.

phrases.phrase: Let's revisit your goals given the new priorities
phrases.meaning: Adjusts objectives due to changing circumstances.
phrases.example: Let's revisit your goals given the new priorities.

phrases.phrase: I appreciate your flexibility during this time
phrases.meaning: Thanks the team for adapting to change.
phrases.example: I appreciate your flexibility during this time of change.

phrases.phrase: We're going to get through this together
phrases.example: We're going to get through this together as a team.

phrases.phrase: Let's document the lessons learned
phrases.meaning: Suggests capturing insights from a project.
phrases.example: Let's document the lessons learned before we move on.

phrases.phrase: I want this team to thrive, not just survive
phrases.meaning: Sets an ambitious, positive tone for the team.
phrases.example: I want this team to thrive, not just survive this reorg.

phrases.phrase: Let's do a retro on what went well and what didn't
phrases.example: Let's do a retro on what went well and what didn't.

phrases.phrase: I'll make sure leadership hears about your work
phrases.meaning: Promises to advocate for someone's visibility.
phrases.example: I'll make sure leadership hears about your work on this.

phrases.phrase: Your growth matters to me as much as the results
phrases.example: Your growth matters to me as much as the results.

quiz.question: Which phrase grants someone independence in decision-making?
options: I'll give you full autonomy on this
This isn't meeting the bar we've set
I need to hold you accountable for this
quiz.answer: I'll give you full autonomy on this
quiz.explanation: 'Autonomy' means independence to decide and act.

quiz.question: Which phrase introduces feedback meant to help someone improve?
options: I want to give you some constructive feedback
Let's celebrate this win as a team
I've got your back on this
quiz.answer: I want to give you some constructive feedback
quiz.explanation: 'Constructive feedback' is meant to help, not just criticize.

quiz.question: Which phrase reassures a team during organizational change?
options: We're going to get through this together
I trust your judgment on this
Let's map out a plan together
quiz.answer: We're going to get through this together
quiz.explanation: This reassures and unites the team during uncertainty.

quiz.question: Let's do a ___ on what went well and what didn't. (review session)
quiz.explanation: A 'retro' (retrospective) reviews a project's successes and failures.

quiz.question: Which phrase asks what's preventing someone from succeeding?
options: I'd like to understand what's blocking you
I believe in your ability to pull this off
Let's set some clear goals for next quarter
This is your call to make
quiz.answer: I'd like to understand what's blocking you
quiz.explanation: This directly asks about obstacles to performance.
